code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut nums = [0, 0]
  mut count = 0
  mut cur = 0
  mut has = false
  mut sign = 1
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      has = true
    else if b == 45 and not has
      sign = -1
    else
      if has
        if count == 0
          nums = [cur * sign, 0]
        else
          nums = [nums[0], cur * sign]
        end
        count = count + 1
        cur = 0
        has = false
        sign = 1
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has
    if count == 0
      nums = [cur * sign, 0]
    else
      nums = [nums[0], cur * sign]
    end
    count = count + 1
  end
  let a = nums[0]
  let b = nums[1]
  let r = a * a + b * b
  println("r=#{r}")
end
